job_description: • Minimum Qualifications4+ years of software development experience in Java, with strong object-oriented design skillsExperience in both frontend and backend development, including building and maintaining large-scale, scalable systemsHands-on experience with relational and non-relational databases and proficiency with Unix operating systemsSolid knowledge of application performance optimization techniques and caching solutionsBachelor's degree in Computer Science/Engineering or equivalent work related experience.

• Minimum QualificationsExperience with professional software development in a C-like programming language (Swift, Objective-C, Java, C++, C#, etc.
• )Familiarity with concurrent programming concepts and design patterns, such as multi-threading, serialization, and lockingDemonstrated ability to quickly learn and apply new technologies while working collaboratively with othersExcellent communication and interpersonal skillsBachelor's Degree in Computer Science, an engineering-related field, or equivalent related experience.
